visual_mood: Editorial split layout -- product on the left, clean stacked feature list on the right, dark wood surface

layout.composition: Product occupies left 55% of frame on a dark wooden surface with warm side lighting. Right 45% has 4 feature labels stacked vertically with thin horizontal lines connecting each to the product. Headline at top spanning full width. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline largest, feature labels medium, descriptions small
layout.background: Dark wooden table, warm window light from left, blurred warm bokeh

product.placement: Only ONE pair. Left side of frame on dark wooden surface, 3/4 angle, warm window light catching the glossy lens with natural reflections
product.instruction: Only ONE pair of sunglasses matching the reference image. Real glossy sunglasses on a real surface with real light.

brand.color_scheme: Warm dark wood tones, white text, thin red horizontal connector lines

prompt: An editorial product photograph on a dark wooden table with warm window light from the left. Only ONE pair of Bandits Green sunglasses from DuberyMNL on the left side of the frame at 3/4 angle -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image with natural lens reflections and real shadow on wood. On the right side, four feature labels stacked vertically with thin red horizontal lines connecting each to the product: 'POLARIZED LENSES', 'UV400 PROTECTION', 'FLEXIBLE TEMPLES', 'DURABLE HINGES', each with a small description below. All text in the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. White headline 'BANDITS GREEN' at top. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, magazine editorial feel.
